cardInfo.name: Anthropic: Claude Sonnet 4.6
cardInfo.summary: Claude Sonnet 4.6 is Anthropic's latest and most capable Sonnet model, building on the strengths of Sonnet 4.5 with further improvements to coding, agentic workflows, and reasoning. It delivers state-of-the-art performance across a wide range of tasks, including software engineering, tool use, and complex multi-step problem solving. Sonnet 4.6 features enhanced instruction following, improved context management, and more reliable tool orchestration, making it well-suited for sustained autonomous operation and real-world agent deployments.
